headline: SMS for Your Business,
description: Sign up in minutes, add a card, get a dedicated number. Send reminders, confirmations, and marketing blasts — priced at cost plus a flat margin, with no per-seat fees, no minimums, and no quarterly reviews.
bullets: Dedicated US phone number, provisioned automatically
Templates, contacts, opt-in/opt-out, and audit log out of the box
A2P 10DLC compliance handled by SaaSless Forge
Monthly budget cap + transparent usage dashboard
footnote: US numbers only at launch. Approval typically within 1 business day.
